A '''photon missile''' was a type of projectile weapon used by the naval forces of [[Dorande]]<ref name="Droids 5" /> around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]].<ref name="Date">[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2's]] entry in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' notes that the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] occur prior to the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] cartoon, which is dated to [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] by {{PolyhedronCite|170|Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO}}. The comic also follows the droids' separation from Captain Antilles, who was granted custody of them in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to that year.</ref>

A secret Dorande naval invasion force once fired a salvo of photon [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] at [[Kirk Windjammer]]'s [[anti-grav loader]], destroying it, although Windjammer used his craft's anti-gravity unit to deflect one. Windjammer barely escaped with his [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].<ref name="Droids 5" />

==Behind the scenes==
Photon missiles appear in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] comic [[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]].
